reviews.comment:
La verdad, no se por qué no ponen personal que quieran trabajar. Para tomar un café, 15 minutos para atender a una persona adelante mío,( entre dos chicas, matándose de risa)10:55 hs, no había nadie pero pasa eso cuando no les importa el trabajo.
Una lastima

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, I don't know why they don't hire staff who actually want to work. It took 15 minutes to get a coffee and wait for the person in front of me (between two girls, laughing their heads off) at 10:55 am. There was nobody else around, but that's what happens when they don't care about their jobs. It's a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNydi02dzh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención para la nafta La cafetería está renovada y los precios también jaja ,muy caro pero agradable

(Translated by Google)
Good service for the gas station. The cafeteria is renovated and the prices too, haha, very expensive but nice.

reviews.comment:
Muy caro el shop pero completa la atención de la estación de servicio, los baños muy limpios y hasta tenés para cargar el termo de agua caliente gratis ..

(Translated by Google)
The shop is very expensive but it complements the service station's amenities, the bathrooms are very clean and you can even fill your thermos with hot water for free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyNEpQM2dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mi opinion es acerca de la oficina del ACA de Maschwitz, realmente una falta de respeto que no abran a la hora indicada, mas de una hora esperando para hacer un tramite teniendo que ir a trabajar. La YPF full muy buen servicio y atención.

(Translated by Google)
My opinion is about the ACA office in Maschwitz. It's truly disrespectful that they don't open at the scheduled time. I had to wait over an hour to complete a procedure while I had to get to work. The YPF station, on the other hand, has excellent service and attention.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMcjdHalZnEAE
